title: Simple Freeze Plugin
description: A simple plugin that allows you to freeze all players (or specific ones) except yourself using the /freeze command.
body:
# Simple Freeze Plugin

A 1.21.4 plugin that allows you to freeze all players except yourself using the `/freeze` command.

## Features

- **Global Freeze Command**: Use `/freeze` to toggle freeze state for all players except the command executor
- **Individual Freeze Command**: Use `/freeze <playername>` to freeze or unfreeze a specific player
- **Complete Freeze**: Frozen players cannot move, chat, use commands, break/place blocks, interact with items, or attack
- **Permission System**: Only players with the **OP** permissions can use the command
- **Auto-Freeze New Players**: Players who join during a global freeze are automatically frozen
- **Visual Feedback**: Players receive messages when frozen/unfrozen
- **Self-Protection**: Players cannot freeze themselves

## Usage

- `/freeze` - Toggle freeze state for all players except yourself
- `/freeze <playername>` - Toggle freeze state for a specific player only


## What Gets Frozen

When players are frozen, they cannot:
- Move (including walking, running, jumping)
- Chat or send messages
- Use any commands
- Break or place blocks
- Interact with items, blocks, or entities
- Use their inventory
- Attack other entities
- Take damage
